prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda FE3-DOHC 2.0L turbocharged inline-4** (from the Mazda MX-6 GT) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger**, forged internals (JE 8.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a **Tomei 264° camshaft** for high-RPM power delivery, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **HKS Hi-Power** with a **4-2-1 equal-length header** (fabricated by **Spoon Sports** for FE-series engines) and a **GReddy Profec E-01 electronic boost controller** to manage 1.2 bar of boost, targeting **320 hp at 7,200 RPM** with a **Tomei Type-S blow-off valve**.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom-valved for the Proceed Levante’s **BG chassis**), **Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars**, and **Powerflex polybushings** (specifically the **MAZDA BG5P-34-410** subframe bushings) to eliminate chassis flex, complemented by **Brembo GT 330mm front brake kit** (with **Ferodo DS2500 pads**) for aggressive stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified for the Proceed Levante’s **BG platform**), featuring **custom carbon fiber overfenders**, a **duckbill rear spoiler**, and **custom front canards** by **Vertex Japan** for aggressive aerodynamics and stance.

**Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +38 wheels** (ET38 offset) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 235/40R17 tires**, paired with **custom wheel spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the arches, and **painted brake calipers** in **Mazda Racing Blue** with **gold Brembo logos**.

**Full custom interior** by **Recaro** featuring **SP-G XL seats** (with **Mazda Racing Blue Alcantara inserts**), a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (with **Mazda M logo**), and a **full carbon fiber dashboard overlay** (by **Seibon Carbon**) with **digital gauge cluster** (AEM X-Series) replacing the stock analog setup.
